g.title: pre_cartridge->score_cartridge
g.text: LOOK SCREEN; answer ASTRAL BODY; wait; GET CARTRIDGE

g.title: pre_bay->score_bay
g.text: PRESS OPEN BAY DOOR; wait f30

g.title: pre_autonav->score_autonav
g.text: CLOSE DOOR; FASTEN BELT; PRESS POWER; PRESS AUTONAV

g.title: score_landing->pre_kit
g.text: yields water12+knife19; UNFASTEN BELT; LEAVE POD

g.title: pre_kit->score_kit
g.text: GET SURVIVAL KIT; OPEN SURVIVAL KIT

g.title: score_arch->pre_geyser
g.text: upper-left opened control passage ->27; never take room26 rock

g.title: pre_beams->score_beams
g.text: USE GLASS ON BEAM; wait f121

g.title: pre_orat_kill->score_orat_kill
g.text: THROW WATER AT ORAT; wait f75

g.title: score_ulence->pre_skimmer_sale
g.text: get jetpack9+money; room38 GET BUCKAZOIDS x86..114 y108..119; bar

g.title: pre_skimmer_sale->score_skimmer_sale
g.text: NO at v58=4; wait return; YES at v58=7

g.title: pre_beer->score_beer
g.text: BUY BEER then DRINK BEER; repeat exactly 3

g.title: pre_droid->score_droid
g.text: cross selector x93..114 y65..69; BUY DROID

g.title: score_droid->rng_ship
g.text: Save; return to slots if v124<214

g.title: rng_droid->rng_droid
g.text: loss/insufficient: restore or wager again; never accept broke state

g.title: pre_airlock->score_airlock
g.text: TURN HANDLE at x70..89 y101..106; fly in; WAIT

g.title: score_airlock->pre_trunk
g.text: room53 exit; PUT JETPACK IN TRUNK; close; PUSH TRUNK; CLIMB TRUNK; OPEN VENT

g.title: pre_trunk->score_trunk
g.text: OPEN TRUNK; ENTER TRUNK; WAIT transport

g.title: score_trunk->pre_vent
g.text: never closed-vent branch; traverse room52 grate

g.title: score_disguise->pre_guard_talk
g.text: Move into a corridor other than room 50 and wait for a roaming guard to approach within dista...

g.title: score_guard_yes->pre_guard_kiss
g.text: Keep or regain a guard distance of at most 30.

g.title: pre_guard_kiss->score_guard_kiss
g.text: priority corridor ->51; never shoot roaming guard

g.title: pre_grenade1->score_grenade1
g.text: wait droid not watching; GET GRENADE

g.title: pre_remote->score_remote
g.text: SEARCH BODY or GET REMOTE CONTROL

g.title: score_destruct->pre_shuttle
g.text: ENTER SHIP at x0..24 y120..124; wait f35

g.title: rng_question->rng_question
g.text: other response: repeat on next close approach
